criteria.reason: batch_get_active_alerts / batch_filter_active_alerts drain streams and return {status:ok, alert_count, alerts, unreachable_nodes} (axxon_mcp_logic_alerts.py L113-136); empty nodes -> {status:error} before any wire call; ReadTests assert client.calls==[] on empty nodes.

5 gated review tools call matching LogicService RPCs (BatchBeginAlertsReview/BatchContinueAlertsRewiew/BatchCancelAlertsReview/BatchCompleteAlertsReview/BatchEscalateAlerts) and return {status:applied, success, failure, unreachable_nodes}; ReviewTests assert calls[0][0]==rpc for all five. Spec text mentions an escalate priority field, but the impl exposes comment only matching the live-verified wire shape; the substantive criterion (correct RPC + applied result shape) is met.

_write_gate returns disabled when AXXON_LOGIC_ALERTS_APPROVE!=1 and gap on wrong token (L99-104); _gated_review returns error on empty nodes (L152-154); all paths return before _stub_and_pb2/wire call; GateTests assert client.calls==[] for disabled/gap/empty; test_no_config_secret_leak passes.

All six wiring edits present in axxon_mcp_server.py: create_server logic_alerts param (L65), conditional register call (L201-202), register_logic_alerts_tools with 8 @server.tool entries (L1062-1101), --enable-logic-alerts flag (L1639-1643), flag-gated instantiation in main (L1821-1825), logic_alerts=logic_alerts in create_server call (L1856). Full suite Ran 852 OK; logic-alerts suite 8 OK.

api_methods.json: BatchGetActiveAlerts/BatchFilterActiveAlerts/BatchBeginAlertsReview/BatchContinueAlertsRewiew/BatchCancelAlertsReview/BatchEscalateAlerts all live_status tested-pass; BatchCompleteAlertsReview is pending (not tested-pass). LogicService 21/29. Global tested-pass 235 (361 total). Coverage doc capability-vs-coverage-2026-06-05.md shows 235/100/26 and item 10v documenting phase-35. Restamp dry-run reports 0.

known_gaps: BatchCompleteAlertsReview left pending/fixture-warn (unreachable without a reviewable alert) - intended and documented.
Counter ops fixture-walled (no counter configured on stand) - out of scope.
live_evidence_note: Live-stand batch reads, gate matrix, 4 clean review no-ops, and the BatchComplete unreachable note are recorded in raw/live-verify.txt; treated as the recorded artifact (no stand creds available to this verifier).
